tools.name: nature-sounds
tools.description: Use to open an interactive nature-sounds player when the user wants calming background audio or a guided ambience experience, such as for studying, working, meditation, winding down, or sleep preparation. Accepts an optional `sound` parameter to choose the starting ambience. Supported values are `waves`, `forest-rain`, `crackling-fireplace`, `mountain-breeze`, `flowing-river`, `birds-at-sunrise`, `distant-waterfall`, and `night-crickets`; when omitted, the player starts with `waves`. Prefer this tool when the user requests a playable sound environment rather than text-only advice.
